companyNameJapanese: 扶桑化学工業株式会社
description: Manufactures and sells life science and electronic material products. Electronic materials include ultra-high purity colloidal silica and high purity organo silica sol for semiconductor CMP processes.

_externalRelationships.notes: 90% global market share in semiconductor CMP slurries. 50%+ of global production capacity. Proprietary ultra-high purity colloidal silica (total metal ions <1ppm).

_metadata.notes: Founded 1952, HQ: Osaka. 930 employees. Key products: ultra-high purity colloidal silica for semiconductor polishing, organic acids for life sciences. Expanded production capacity 50% in 2022.
